ddls:
CREATE TABLE "speeches" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the speech */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the speech was delivered */,
  "speech_text" TEXT /* Text of the speech */,
  "audio_file" TEXT /* File path to the audio file */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the speech was delivered */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the speech was delivered */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the speech */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the speech */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the speech */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the speech was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the speech was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the speaker is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Correctness of the answer (1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_topics" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_speakers" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_questions" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speech_answers" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speech */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id", "answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view speeches, edit questions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the question answering system */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the question answering system */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the question answering system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
